svg.title: The Claude on Foundry Starter Kit — architecture overview
svg.desc: Three clients (Claude Code CLI, GitHub Copilot in VS Code, Python anthropic SDK) call into a Microsoft Entra ID authentication path that issues a bearer token, which is then used to call Claude model deployments hosted on a Microsoft Foundry account, exposed through the Anthropic-compatible /anthropic endpoint. The Foundry account itself is provisioned by azd up using either the Bicep or the Terraform IaC variant in this repo.

g.text: The Claude on Foundry Starter Kit
Deploy Claude models with azd up and call them with the official Claude SDKs over Entra ID
Cognitive Services account · AI Services kind
One command. Pick your IaC flavor — same Foundry, identical outcome.
POST /v1/messages · same wire format as api.anthropic.com
Infrastructure as Code (Bicep + Terraform parity) · Passwordless with Entra ID · Official Claude SDK · One-command deploy
